description: This track focuses on the final layer of product polish, accessibility, and deployment readiness required to transition the application from a functional prototype to a production-grade web app. It implements Progressive Web App (PWA) capabilities including service workers for offline resilience, an explicit 'Reconnecting...' offline state UI, and dynamic theme color synchronization. Additionally, it unifies the Juice sensory feedback by integrating haptic vibrations alongside the existing audio effects, ensures full WCAG 2.1 AA compliance by adding aria-live announcements for critical game state changes, and finalizes the deployment architecture by providing a multi-stage Dockerfile tailored for self-hosting on Coolify.
